items.title: Why Kevin Durants is not playing vs Lakers today. Rockets give injury return timeline
items.summary: The Houston Rockets will once again be without their star forward Kevin Durant for Game 4 of their first-round playoff series against the Los Angeles Lakers
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Newcastle interested in Jackson - Monday's gossip
items.summary: Newcastle are keen on Nicolas Jackson, Nottingham Forest eye Hayden Hackney as Elliot Anderson replacement, and Chelsea are considering reuniting with Antonio Conte.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Sibley’s century gives Surrey edge over Essex: county cricket, day three – as it happened
